nasb.text: On the first day of every week each one of you is to put aside and save, as he may prosper, so that no collections be made when I come.

esv.text: On the first day of every week, each of you is to put something aside and store it up, as he may prosper, so that there will be no collecting when I come.

cnv.text: 每逢七日的第一日，你們各人要按著自己的收入抽一些出來留著，免得我來的時候才現湊。

ccb.text: 每逢周日，各人应按照自己的收入抽出一部分留起来，免得我到的时候才现凑。

csbs.text: 每周的头一天，你们每个人如果充裕，就应当从中拿出一些积蓄起来，免得我来的时候才开始收集。
